title: Yood's Paintings Collection
description: This mod adds additional paintings to the game.
body:
This mod adds additional paintings to the game from Yood's Personal Collection.

This mod adds:
- 36 Paintings
- 7 Music Discs

This is a small portion of **"Yood's Collection"**.

Subscribe to me on YouTube - 
https://youtube.com/@DaneMakesMusic
https://youtube.com/@ForbiddenLandPodcast
